subject.description: Three realistic marketing team members in everyday casual office wear.
subject.action: Huddled closely around a single laptop on a crowded desk. One person points intensely at a spreadsheet on the screen, reflecting real budget pressure.

setting.location: A cramped, slightly messy startup office with exposed brick and no fancy enterprise decor.

composition.camera_angle: Eye-level medium shot, slightly angled to include all three people and the laptop.
composition.framing: Rule of thirds. MUST follow cropping rules: never cut in flesh, leave safe headspace above all three figures, full upper bodies visible.

camera_settings.depth_of_field: Medium depth of field, keeping the three subjects in sharp focus while the messy background is slightly blurred.

lighting.type: Harsh, unpolished fluorescent light mixed with some dim natural light.
lighting.color_grading: Slightly desaturated, realistic tones, emphasizing exhaustion and tight deadlines.

aesthetic_style: RAW photo, authentic unretouched photography, shot on 35mm film, hyper realistic photorealism, actual human beings. DO NOT MAKE IT A CARTOON OR DIGITAL ART.
negative_prompt: Things that MUST NOT appear: more than three people, crowds, duplicate identical faces, digital art, illustration, vector art, cartoon, 3D render, CGI, polished enterprise aesthetic, text, watermarks, deformities, bad anatomy.
